info.name: AI Powered Enterprise Citizen Service & Grievance Management Platform API
info.description: Master, non-inlining OpenAPI 3.1 document for the platform described in docs/API_SPECIFICATION.md (Sections 1-16) and docs/Enterprise-API-Endpoint-Catalog.md. Every path and every reusable component below is a $ref into an external file; this document contains no inline endpoint definitions.

exec: // Generate a fresh correlation id for every request in this collection,
// mirroring the platform's X-Correlation-Id convention (API_SPECIFICATION.md Section 1.14).
pm.test('Response time is within collection-wide budget (2000ms)', function () {
pm.test('Response time is less than 1000ms', function () {

request.description:
operationId: authCitizenOtpRequest

Send a one-time password to a citizen's registered mobile number to begin registration or login (SRS §3.1, §2.5 — Mobile OTP is the only citizen authentication method). API_SPECIFICATION.md Section 2.1.

response.name: 200 - OTP dispatched.
400 - Bad Request
429 - Too Many Requests
500 - Internal Server Error
503 - Service Unavailable

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 1000ms', function () {

request.description:
operationId: authCitizenOtpVerify

Verify the OTP and issue session tokens; creates the user/ citizen_profile row on first-ever verification (registration), or logs in an existing citizen. API_SPECIFICATION.md Section 2.2.

response.name: 200 - Login/registration successful; tokens issued.
400 - Bad Request
401 - OTP_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED
429 - Too Many Requests
500 - Internal Server Error

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 1000ms', function () {

request.description:
operationId: authOfficerLogin

Authenticate an Officer or Department Admin's username/password and trigger the mandatory OTP second factor (SRS §8.1). API_SPECIFICATION.md Section 2.3.

response.name: 200 - Credentials accepted; OTP challenge issued.
400 - Bad Request
401 - INVALID_CREDENTIALS
423 - Unknown
500 - Internal Server Error

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 1000ms', function () {

request.description:
operationId: authOfficerOtpVerify

Complete Officer/Department Admin login by verifying the OTP from the login step, issuing session tokens. API_SPECIFICATION.md Section 2.4.

response.name: 200 - Login successful; tokens issued.
401 - OTP_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED
429 - Too Many Requests
500 - Internal Server Error

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 1000ms', function () {

request.description:
operationId: authAdminLogin

Authenticate Corporation Admin / Super Admin credentials and trigger mandatory TOTP MFA (SRS §8.1 — MFA enforcement locked "on" for these two roles). API_SPECIFICATION.md Section 2.5.

response.name: 200 - Credentials accepted; MFA challenge issued.
400 - Bad Request
401 - INVALID_CREDENTIALS
409 - Conflict
423 - ACCOUNT_LOCKED
500 - Internal Server Error

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 1000ms', function () {

request.description:
operationId: authMfaVerify

500 - Internal Server Error

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 1000ms', function () {

request.description:
operationId: authTokenRefresh

Exchange a valid, unexpired refresh token for a new access token, rotating the refresh token itself (SRS §8.1 — single-use, rotated on each use). API_SPECIFICATION.md Section 2.7.

response.name: 200 - New access/refresh token pair issued.
401 - Unauthorized
500 - Internal Server Error

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 1000ms', function () {

operationId: authLogout

response.name: 200 - Logged out.

500 - Internal Server Error

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 1000ms', function () {

operationId: authForgotPassword

query.description: Comma-separated list of sortable field names, each optionally prefixed with `-` for descending order, ascending by default (e.g. `-createdAt,priority`) (API_SPECIFICATION.md Section 1.9). Each endpoint publishes its own explicit sortable-field allow-list; an unrecognized field returns 400 Validation

Opaque keyset-pagination cursor encoding the last-seen sort key, returned as `meta.pagination.nextCursor` by the previous page (API_SPECIFICATION.md Section 1.8; 12-Standard-Response-Formats.md Section 12.3). Used on high-volume, time-ordered collections - complaints, audit logs, activity logs, noti
Max 100, default 20.
